section: H1:Privacy Policy
sentence: Bao Nhan Dan ("us", "we", or "our") operates the Bao Nhan Dan mobile application (the "Service").

section: H1:Privacy Policy
sentence: This page informs you of our policies regarding the collection, use, and disclosure of personal data when you use our Service and the choices you have associated with that data. Our Privacy Policy for Bao Nhan Dan is created with the help of the Free Privacy Policy Generator.

section: H1:Privacy Policy
sentence: We use your data to provide and improve the Service. By using the Service, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy. Unless otherwise defined in this Privacy Policy, terms used in this Privacy Policy have the same meanings as in our Terms and Conditions.

section: H1:Privacy Policy > H2:Information Collection And Use
sentence: We collect several different types of information for various purposes to provide and improve our Service to you.

section: H1:Privacy Policy > H2:Information Collection And Use > H3:Types of Data Collected > H4:Personal Data
sentence: While using our Service, we may ask you to provide us with certain personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify you ("Personal Data"). Personally identifiable information may include, but is not limited to: Email address

sentence: While using our Service, we may ask you to provide us with certain personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify you ("Personal Data"). Personally identifiable information may include, but is not limited to: First name and last name

sentence: While using our Service, we may ask you to provide us with certain personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify you ("Personal Data"). Personally identifiable information may include, but is not limited to: Phone number

section: H1:Privacy Policy > H2:Information Collection And Use > H3:Types of Data Collected > H4:Personal Data
sentence: While using our Service, we may ask you to provide us with certain personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify you ("Personal Data"). Personally identifiable information may include, but is not limited to: Cookies and Usage Data

section: H1:Privacy Policy > H2:Information Collection And Use > H3:Types of Data Collected > H4:Usage Data
sentence: When you access the Service by or through a mobile device, we may collect certain information automatically, including, but not limited to, the type of mobile device you use, your mobile device unique ID, the IP address of your mobile device, your mobile operating system, the type of mobile Internet browser you use, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data ("Usage Data").

section: H1:Privacy Policy > H2:Information Collection And Use > H3:Types of Data Collected > H4:Tracking & Cookies Data
sentence: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track the activity on our Service and hold certain information.

section: H1:Privacy Policy > H2:Information Collection And Use > H3:Types of Data Collected > H4:Tracking & Cookies Data
sentence: Cookies are files with small amount of data which may include an anonymous unique identifier. Cookies are sent to your browser from a website and stored on your device. Tracking technologies also used are beacons, tags, and scripts to collect and track information and to improve and analyze our Service.

section: H1:Privacy Policy > H2:Information Collection And Use > H3:Types of Data Collected > H4:Tracking & Cookies Data
sentence: You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent. However, if you do not accept cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of our Service.

section: H1:Privacy Policy > H2:Information Collection And Use > H3:Types of Data Collected > H4:Tracking & Cookies Data
sentence: Examples of Cookies we use: Session Cookies. We use Session Cookies to operate our Service.

section: H1:Privacy Policy > H2:Information Collection And Use > H3:Types of Data Collected > H4:Tracking & Cookies Data
sentence: Examples of Cookies we use: Preference Cookies. We use Preference Cookies to remember your preferences and various settings.

section: H1:Privacy Policy > H2:Information Collection And Use > H3:Types of Data Collected > H4:Tracking & Cookies Data
sentence: Examples of Cookies we use: Security Cookies. We use Security Cookies for security purposes.

section: H1:Privacy Policy > H2:Transfer Of Data
sentence: Your information, including Personal Data, may be transferred to â€” and maintained on â€” computers located outside of your state, province, country or other governmental jurisdiction where the data protection laws may differ than those from your jurisdiction.

section: H1:Privacy Policy > H2:Transfer Of Data
sentence: If you are located outside Viet Nam and choose to provide information to us, please note that we transfer the data, including Personal Data, to Viet Nam and process it there.

section: H1:Privacy Policy > H2:Transfer Of Data
sentence: Your consent to this Privacy Policy followed by your submission of such information represents your agreement to that transfer.

section: H1:Privacy Policy > H2:Transfer Of Data
sentence: Bao Nhan Dan will take all steps reasonably necessary to ensure that your data is treated securely and in accordance with this Privacy Policy and no transfer of your Personal Data will take place to an organization or a country unless there are adequate controls in place including the security of your data and other personal information.

section: H1:Privacy Policy > H2:Security Of Data
sentence: The security of your data is important to us, but remember that no method of transmission over the Internet, or method of electronic storage is 100% secure. While we strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect your Personal Data, we cannot guarantee its absolute security.

section: H1:Privacy Policy > H2:Service Providers
sentence: We may employ third party companies and individuals to facilitate our Service ("Service Providers"), to provide the Service on our behalf, to perform Service-related services or to assist us in analyzing how our Service is used.

section: H1:Privacy Policy > H2:Service Providers
sentence: These third parties have access to your Personal Data only to perform these tasks on our behalf and are obligated not to disclose or use it for any other purpose.

section: H1:Privacy Policy > H2:Links To Other Sites
sentence: Our Service may contain links to other sites that are not operated by us. If you click on a third party link, you will be directed to that third party's site. We strongly advise you to review the Privacy Policy of every site you visit.

section: H1:Privacy Policy > H2:Links To Other Sites
sentence: We have no control over and assume no responsibility for the content, privacy policies or practices of any third party sites or services.

section: H1:Privacy Policy > H2:Children's Privacy
sentence: Our Service does not address anyone under the age of 18 ("Children").

section: H1:Privacy Policy > H2:Children's Privacy
sentence: We do not knowingly collect personally identifiable information from anyone under the age of 18. If you are a parent or guardian and you are aware that your Children has provided us with Personal Data, please contact us. If we become aware that we have collected Personal Data from children without verification of parental consent, we take steps to remove that information from our servers.

section: H1:Privacy Policy > H2:Changes To This Privacy Policy
sentence: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page.

section: H1:Privacy Policy > H2:Changes To This Privacy Policy
sentence: We will let you know via email and/or a prominent notice on our Service, prior to the change becoming effective and update the "effective date" at the top of this Privacy Policy.

section: H1:Privacy Policy > H2:Changes To This Privacy Policy
sentence: You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes. Changes to this Privacy Policy are effective when they are posted on this page.

section: H1:Privacy Policy > H2:Contact Us
sentence: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us: By email: 3dart.dimension@gmail.com
